productDisplayName: Ed Hardy Men Silver Dial Watch
description: Tattoo artist ed hardy has taken the world by storm with his funky, urban brand - from rock stars to Hollywood legends, those who have a quirky taste in fashion love the tattoo inspired designs. Wear this watch to prove you're a style maverick not a trend follower. Comes in an original ed hardy box Case diameter: 32 mm Case thickness: 6mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 2 years Stainless steel case Black genuine leather strap and a tang clasp Silver dial with metallic hands and a geisha's face on the dial Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability
